description: Style NoteThe Spanish influences in the design details of this sandal is the reason for the Spanish name. Subtle, pastel hues, super soft footbed styling and classic designs with a sophisticated polish, style this pair with kohl-rimmed eyes and an ethno-western ensemble!Heel: 2.5"Product DetailsBlack sandal with criss-crossing forefoot and midfoot straps with wedge style heelSoft footbed with branding on the heelTPR outsole with curved grooves all over Material and CareSyntheticWipe surface with a clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine washDo not store in direct sunlight
